work_experience.company: Institute for Experiential AI, Northeastern University
description: Designed and implemented scalable, CMS-driven web architectures using Webflow, improving maintainability and enabling dynamic content delivery across multiple sections of the platform.
Developed custom JavaScript-based filtering, query parameter handling, and interactive UI components to enhance user experience and support complex data-driven navigation.
Collaborated with stakeholders to translate design concepts into production-ready implementations, bridging no-code tools with advanced frontend engineering practices.
Developed and optimized full-stack applications, building backend services and frontend interfaces to support athlete management, booking systems, and AI-driven features.
Implemented AI-powered coaching systems and computer vision pipelines, integrating external APIs and processing workflows to enhance platform functionality.
Improved system performance and scalability by optimizing API interactions, data flows, and backend architecture across production-level features.
Led development of a laboratory data directory web application, improving accessibility and usability of structured experimental data.
Streamlined ORM interactions between backend services and relational databases using SQLAlchemy, improving data management efficiency and reliability.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design scalable backend systems and integrate frontend components for production-ready applications.
Developed an RFID-based smart billing system to automate checkout processes and reduce transaction time in retail environments.
Built computer vision models for face mask detection and sign language recognition, applying machine learning techniques to real-world problems.
Worked on embedded systems and robotics projects involving sensors, microcontrollers, and automation workflows.

courseworks: Theory & Practical Applications of Generative AI
UX Design in Era of Generative AI
